from celery import Celery
from flask import request

app = Celery('tasks')

@app.task
def send_email_task(request_obj):
    # Dangerous: depending on a request context object in a background job
    user_email = request_obj.json['email']
    send_email(user_email)

@route("/signup")
def signup():
    send_email_task.delay(request)
